form.label: Repository
form.hint: Paste a GitHub repository URL or owner/repo.
form.branchHint: Choose the GitHub branch to analyze.
form.branchLoadFailedHint: Branch list is unavailable. You can run analysis without selecting a branch; Frontend Radar will use the repository default branch if GitHub access is available.
form.projectPathToggleHint: Use this when the frontend app lives inside a monorepo.
form.projectPathHint: Repo-relative folder that contains the frontend package.json.

errors.branchNotFound: Selected branch was not found on GitHub.
errors.invalidProjectPath: Enter a valid repo-relative folder path.
errors.repositoryNotFound: Repository was not found on GitHub.
errors.projectPathNotFound: package.json was not found in the selected frontend path.
errors.repositoryForbidden: This repository is private, or the configured GitHub token does not have access.
errors.githubRateLimited: GitHub API rate limit was reached. Check the GitHub token or try again later.
errors.githubUnavailable: GitHub is unavailable right now. Try again later.
errors.repositoryVerificationFailed: GitHub could not verify this repository. Check access and try again in a moment.
errors.unknown: Could not start repository analysis. Try again.
